_comment: Public-alpha cohort registry. Hand-maintained — there is no enrolment server. Add a member only with their consent; a cohort is a group of people the founder talks to, not a tracked population. `checkins` are voluntary `recall stats` pastes (see apps/admin/README.md).

cohorts.label: Alpha 001 — first installs
cohorts.notes: The first real users. Watched closely; high-touch.

cohorts.label: Alpha 002 — second wave
cohorts.notes: Opens after alpha-001 friction is addressed.

cohorts.label: Friends
cohorts.notes: Forgiving testers; good for rough edges.

cohorts.label: Builders
cohorts.notes: Developers — interrupted-coding recovery is their loop.

cohorts.label: Students
cohorts.notes: Multi-day investigation continuity is their loop.
